name: Block3_DiEi
comment: Interrupt master enable control. DI clears IME immediately; EI schedules IME=1 to take effect AFTER the next instruction (one-instruction delay per LR35902 spec). RETI in block3-ret.json bypasses this and enables IME immediately.

formats.name: Ei
formats.comment: 0xFB. Phase 7 GB block-JIT P0.6: migrated from `lr35902_ime_delayed` extern to generic `defer` micro-op (1-instr delay, body sets IME=1). Block-JIT's DeferLowering pre-pass inlines the IME=1 store into the next instruction's steps at compile time (zero runtime cost); per-instr's DeferEmitterPerInstr routes action_id=0 to the same legacy extern (preserves current behaviour). See MD/design/13-defer-microop.md.
